payload.answer: This appears to be additive: the new preference can be added without replacing the existing one.
repair_options: add_new: Add Sonny Rollins as an additional artist Sam from Goldman likes, while keeping Bill Evans.
keep_existing: Keep only the existing preference that Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans and do not add Sonny Rollins.
edit: Edit the preference details before saving, such as clarifying whether both artists are liked by the same Sam from Goldman.
cancel: Do not make any memory change.
